x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Regulatory framework mapping enables Now Assist GRC to provide framework-specific AI compliance recommendations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Map controls and policies to relevant regulatory frameworks (SOC2, ISO27001, NIST, HIPAA) via sn_compliance_authority_document. Now Assist uses framework context for AI compliance guidance.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_43f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ced
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Regulatory framework mapping enables Now Assist GRC to provide framework-specific AI compliance recommendations.]]></ai_justification><check_name>GRC Framework Mapping</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sn_compliance_authority_document');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active authority documents / frameworks';

    if (count >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' regulatory frameworks mapped — Now Assist GRC can provide framework-specific AI compliance guidance.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' framework(s) mapped (target: 3+). Now Assist GRC compliance recommendations will be limited to a narrow regulatory scope.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No regulatory frameworks mapped. Now Assist GRC requires framework context (e.g. SOC2, ISO27001, NIST) for AI compliance recommendations.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>GRC</module><number>CHK0000460</number><order>60</order><remediation_guidance>Map controls and policies to relevant regulatory frameworks (SOC2, ISO27001, NIST, HIPAA) via sn_compliance_authority_document. Now Assist uses framework context for AI compliance guidance.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>43f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ced</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>GRC Framework Mapping</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_43f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851ced</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
